data.title: Alter Wolff Foley & Stutman LLP attorneys honored in Chambers High Net Worth Guide and The Best Lawyers in America, reaffirming their status as top family and matrimonial law firm from New York, as of Aug. 25, 2025.
data.description: A renowned family and matrimonial law firm based in New York, Alter Wolff Foley & Stutman LLP, has recently been acknowledged in the most recent editions of the Chambers Family/Matrimonial: High Net Worth Guide – New York and The Best Lawyers. The firm continues to receive recognition for its expertise in handling high net worth cases, showcasing its commitment to excellence in the field.

data.title: Grayscale files for SEC approval for Spot Avalanche ETF with AVAX ticker, expanding crypto products lineup.
data.description: The recent filing of the Avalanche ETF is part of Grayscale's efforts to broaden its range of cryptocurrency investment offerings. This move comes after the company filed for XRP and DOGE earlier in the year, showcasing its commitment to expanding its product portfolio in the crypto market. This development highlights Grayscale's focus on diversifying its investment options for investors looking to capitalize on the growing digital asset space.

data.title: ScottsMiracle-Gro's 2025 Report showcases progress in eco initiatives, reaching 157M through green partnerships.
data.description: The organization engaged with more than 157 million individuals through collaborations focused on conserving water resources, safeguarding pollinators, and restoring habitats.
KGHM Reports July Copper Production of 59,900 Tonnes, Down 2.4% Year Over Year

data.title: Driven Brands appoints Mo Khalid as COO, Tim Austin as President of Take 5. Khalid, EVP at Take 5, to become COO of Driven Brands.
data.description: In Charlotte, North Carolina, Driven Brands Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: DRVN) revealed the appointment of Mo Khalid as the Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer. Khalid, currently the Executive Vice President and President of Take 5, will be succeeded by Tim Austin, the Chief Operating Officer of Take 5, who will take over as President of Take 5. The Board of Directors made the announcement, expressing confidence in Khalid's leadership skills and successful experience in the industry.
China's Top Lawmaker: Russia and China should maintain good momentum of close exchanges.
Restrictions on takeoff and landing have been lifted at Vladikavkaz airport- reports

data.title: IREN doubles GPU fleet to 8.5k with 4.2k NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs. Secures $102m financing for GPUs.
data.description: In New York on August 25, 2025, IREN Limited (NASDAQ: IREN) revealed the acquisition of 4.2k NVIDIA Blackwell B200 GPUs, effectively increasing their total GPU fleet to about 8.5k NVIDIA GPUs. Alongside this expansion, IREN successfully obtained $102 million in financing specifically for a previous transaction involving NVIDIA Blackwell B200 and B300 GPUs.

data.title: Billionaire's heiress loses $80M in crypto after psychic's advice, sued by best friend for massive bets.
data.description: A member of the Thomson Reuters family is taking legal action against her ex-best friend as a result of substantial cryptocurrency investments amounting to millions, which were made based on advice from a psychic.

data.title: Rooter Hero Plumbing & Air urges LA residents to conserve water in summer heat. Company serves CA and AZ locations.
data.description: In Los Angeles, on August 25, 2025, Rooter Hero Plumbing & Air provided guidance on water conservation and quality through simple maintenance and landscaping changes. The company, known for its plumbing and HVAC services in California and Arizona, offered tips to help both residential and commercial properties save water effectively.

data.title: Survey findings: 1 in 3 companies to have AI-run hiring by 2026. Expansion of AI expected in hiring processes.
data.description: Several companies are swiftly increasing their utilization of artificial intelligence in the recruitment process, with a substantial number anticipating complete automation in the coming years. In a recent survey conducted in August 2025 by Resume.org, a prominent resume-building platform, it was revealed that this trend is gaining momentum. These developments are taking place in Kirkland, Washington, and signify a significant shift in the recruitment landscape. This transformation is expected to impact a substantial number of job applicants and various sectors as AI becomes more integrated into hiring processes.

data.title: PostNet honors franchise owners at 31st conference in Chicago, awards ceremony for global brand franchisees.
data.description: Entrepreneurs from around the world congregated in Chicago for the annual awards ceremony and networking event of a renowned international brand. On August 25, 2025, PostNet, a prominent provider of top-tier printing and shipping services, honored its franchisees and facilitated interactions among them. The event highlighted the achievements of the brand's franchise owners and offered valuable networking opportunities.

data.title: Danish Aerospace Company A/S reports interim report for 2025: Revenue DKK 9.8 million, Gross Profit DKK 7.9 million, Operating Profit DKK 0.4 million, Net profit DKK -0.6 million. Contract signed with ESA for Lunar Gateway exercise device. Joint projects with Adaptix Ltd. and NECAS A/S.(reordered from source)
data.description: Danish Aerospace Company A/S has released its interim report for 2025, showing significant improvement over the same period in 2024. In the first half of 2025, the company reported a revenue of DKK 9.8 million, with a gross profit of DKK 7.9 million, compared to a gross profit of DKK -1.65 million in 2024. Operating profit (EBITDA) amounted to DKK 0.4 million, an increase from DKK -1.9 million in 2024. The company signed a contract with the European Space Agency for a new exercise device for the Lunar Gateway space station and Mars missions. They also partnered with NECAS A/S to develop advanced technological solutions. DAC maintained its financial guidance for 2025 with a total revenue of DKK 21-23 million and operating profit of DKK 1-3 million. The CEO highlighted the completion of four models of their exercise equipment and their expansion into new areas. The company also passed the AS/EN9100 standard quality audit. DAC's collaborations and projects indicate a positive outlook for the future.

data.title: Andrew Mazey promoted to Senior VP at Brennan Investment Group. Capital allocation in Nashville industrial market to increase.
data.description: Brennan Investment Group, a private real estate investment firm based in Rosemont, Illinois, has announced plans to boost capital allocations in the Nashville industrial market. The company specializes in acquiring, developing, and managing industrial facilities across the United States. This move signifies a strategic expansion in their investment portfolio. The decision was made public on August 25, 2025.

data.title: Domino's Pizza offers any pizza with any toppings for $9.99 each, marking the return of "Best Deal Ever" promo.
data.description: Starting from August 25th, 2025, Domino's Pizza Inc. (Nasdaq: DPZ) has kicked off their "Best Deal Ever" promotion in Ann Arbor, Michigan. Customers can now enjoy any pizza with any toppings for just $9.99 each. This limited time offer allows pizza lovers to customize their orders without breaking the bank. This initiative comes as a delightful treat as the summer season comes to a close.

data.title: 85% of health plans have not centralized data; only 57% can integrate external data sources efficiently. AI opportunities untapped.
data.description: A research report by Arcadia highlights the gap between the data capabilities needed by healthcare payers and what many currently lack. The report emphasizes the importance of a unified data foundation for AI applications to be effective in improving savings and experience. Key findings reveal that only 57% of payers rated their ability to integrate external data sources highly, with 85% yet to integrate all available data into a centralized platform. Less than 20% of plans are utilizing AI for care plans and record summaries. The report showcases the need for data-driven strategies to enhance outcomes, manage costs, and improve provider performance in the healthcare sector.

data.title: iBio completes $50M public offering, aims for $100M gross proceeds if warrants exercised, $0.1M expected.
data.description: If all the Series G warrants and Series H warrants are exercised for cash, the total gross proceeds would amount to $100 million.
